name: The People Partner
effect: Redirect employee concerns into documented process. This card is considered supportive.

clauses.name: OPEN DOOR CLAUSE
clauses.rule: When a complaint is raised: The complaint is acknowledged, reframed as a growth opportunity, and filed.

clauses.name: ALIGNMENT PROTECTION
clauses.rule: If any action threatens institutional posture: This card intervenes on behalf of the institution.

clauses.name: ENGAGEMENT SURVEY EFFECT
clauses.rule: Once per quarter: Sentiment is measured, summarized into a positive headline, and presented to leadership as evidence of culture.
